## Contributor checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused and does not contain unrelated changes.
- [ ] Tests and documentation were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private data, or generated build output were committed.
- [ ] Third-party code and assets include the required attribution and license notices.
- [ ] Every commit includes a `Signed-off-by` trailer required by the [DCO](../DCO).
